shared.list_browse_description: Search, filter, and manage records in this list.

create.create_item_categories_and_assign_an_ite: Create item categories and assign an item class
create.msg_failed_to_update_category_please_che: Failed to update category. Please check the errors.
create.msg_failed_to_create_category_please_che: Failed to create category. Please check the errors.
create.subtitle_create: Define a new inventory category and assign item class
create.subtitle_edit: Update category details and item class
create.linked_coa_empty: No costing accounts yet. Saving this category will create inventory, purchase, COGS, and sales accounts when Account Configuration is set up.
create.costing_prereq_title: Account Configuration required for automatic COA
create.costing_prereq_intro: To create Chart of Accounts heads when you save this category, add active Account Configuration rows (this company & location) for every type below. Each row must link to a COA account (Level 3 control account, or Level 4 with a Level 3 parent).

list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} category(ies).

create.msg_please_correct_the_errors_below_and_: Please correct the errors below and try again.
create.ph_class_code: Enter class code (e.g., ELEC, FOOD, CHEM)
create.subtitle_create: Create item class (link to categories later)

list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} item class(es).

create.msg_please_correct_the_errors_below_and_: Please correct the errors below and try again.
create.ph_group_code: Enter group code (e.g., RAW, FG, SPARE)
create.subtitle_create: Create item group (link to categories later)

list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} item group(s).

create.breadcrumb_desc: Create and maintain product masters with complete costing, tracking, and compliance data

form.subtitle_create: Define complete product master with all required specifications
form.subtitle_edit: Update all item details and parameters

tracking.title: Section B: Tracking & UOM Configuration
tracking.description: Define tracking mode and unit of measure conversions

costing.title: Section C: Costing & Procurement
costing.description: Valuation method, reorder points, and vendor information

expiry.title: Section D: Expiry & Storage
expiry.description: Shelf life management and storage requirements

tax.title: Section F: Tax & Trade Compliance
tax.description: Tax codes and international trade information

identifiers.title: Section G: Identifiers & Alternate Codes
identifiers.description: Alternate identifiers, inspection and consignment flags

gl.title: Section H: GL Account Mapping
gl.description: Lists only accounts tied to Account Configuration (by type: inventory, purchase, sales, COGS, etc.), plus this category’s costing accounts. Write-off and variance use selected expense-type configurations.

validation.standard_cost: Standard cost is required for Standard Cost method
validation.shelf_life_days: Shelf life days is required when expiry tracking is enabled
validation.expiry_basis: Expiry basis is required when expiry tracking is enabled
validation.near_expiry_alert_days: Near-expiry alert days is required when expiry tracking is enabled
validation.conversions_min: Add at least one conversion row with To UOM and factor.

create.msg_failed_to_update_item_please_check_t: Failed to update item. Please check the errors.
create.msg_failed_to_create_item_please_check_t: Failed to create item. Please check the errors.

item_code.label: Item Code
item_code.help: Unique identifier - no spaces, alphanumeric + dashes allowed

item_status.label: Item Status
item_status.help: Inactive items cannot be used in new transactions

item_category_id.label: Item Category
item_category_id.help: Select Item Class first. Only categories for that class (or legacy uncategorized) are listed. Category costing accounts auto-fill GL when configured.

brand.label: Brand
brand.placeholder: Brand name or select from master

stock_uom_id.label: Stock UOM
stock_uom_id.help: Base unit for quantity ledger (e.g., Unit, Box, kg, Liter)

purchase_uom_id.label: Purchase UOM
purchase_uom_id.help: Vendor billing unit - may differ from Stock UOM

sales_uom_id.label: Sales UOM
sales_uom_id.help: Customer invoicing unit - may differ from Stock UOM

uom_conversion_table.label: UOM Conversion Table
uom_conversion_table.placeholder: Example: 12 pcs = 1 box; 1 box = 1 stock unit
uom_conversion_table.help: Purchase → Stock → Sales conversion with decimal factors (Sub-table implementation pending)

packaging_hierarchy.label: Packaging Hierarchy
packaging_hierarchy.placeholder: Unit / Box / Case / Pallet with qty per level
packaging_hierarchy.help: For WMS and shipping optimization (Sub-table implementation pending)

package_type_id.label: Package type
package_type_id.placeholder: Select package type (from Package Type Configuration)
package_type_id.help: Linked to Inventory → Master Data → Package Type Configuration.

costing_method.label: Costing Method
costing_method.help: Per IAS 2 policy. LIFO feature-flagged by country

standard_cost.label: Standard Cost
standard_cost.help: Required if Standard Cost method selected. Fixed reference cost for variance tracking

reorder_point.label: Reorder Point
reorder_point.help: When stock falls below this, alert is triggered

substitute_items.label: Substitute Items
substitute_items.help: Other items that can substitute if stockout (Multi-select implementation pending)

expiry_tracking.label: Expiry Tracking
expiry_tracking.help: If enabled, fields below become mandatory

shelf_life_days.label: Shelf Life (days)
shelf_life_days.help: Required only if Expiry Tracking is enabled

expiry_basis.label: Expiry Basis
expiry_basis.help: Start point for shelf life calculation

near_expiry_alert_days.label: Near-Expiry Alert (days)
near_expiry_alert_days.placeholder: E.g., 30 for alert 30 days before expiry

inventory_temperature_class_id.label: Storage Temperature Class
inventory_temperature_class_id.help: Linked to Inventory → Master Data → Temperature Class Configuration.

hazardous_material.label: Hazardous Material Flag
hazardous_material.help: Triggers compliance checks and special storage

country_of_origin_id.label: Country of Origin
country_of_origin_id.help: Pulled from currencies (and country master). Link each currency’s country to a row in Country Master for correct IDs.

origin_currency_id.label: Country of Origin
origin_currency_id.help: Options come from the Currencies master (country name per currency). Country of record is synced to Country Master when matched.

hsn_sac_compliance_code_id.label: HSN Code / SAC Code
hsn_sac_compliance_code_id.help: Maintain codes under Inventory → Master Data → HSN / SAC & HS Tariff Codes (type: HSN / SAC).

hs_tariff_compliance_code_id.label: HS Tariff Code
hs_tariff_compliance_code_id.help: Maintain codes under Inventory → Master Data → HSN / SAC & HS Tariff Codes (type: HS Tariff).

barcode_type_id.label: Barcode Type
barcode_type_id.help: Must match a type defined under Master Data → Barcode Type Configuration.

barcode_gtin.label: Barcode / GTIN
barcode_gtin.help: When a Barcode Type is selected, this field is read-only so values stay aligned with the type master; clear the type to enter a GTIN manually, or load values from your integration.

alternate_item_codes.label: Alternate Item Codes
alternate_item_codes.help: Map vendor SKU, customer part number (Sub-table implementation pending)

inspection_required.label: Inspection Required
inspection_required.help: Triggers QC workflow on GRN receipt

inventory_gl_account_id.label: Inventory GL Account
inventory_gl_account_id.help: Balance sheet stock account (from category when available)

purchase_gl_account_id.label: Purchase GL Account
purchase_gl_account_id.help: Purchase / expense mapping (from category when available)

cogs_gl_account_id.label: COGS GL Account
cogs_gl_account_id.help: Cost of goods sold (from category when available)

sales_gl_account_id.label: Sales / Revenue GL Account
sales_gl_account_id.help: Revenue account for sales of this item (from category when available)

price_variance_gl_account_id.label: Price Variance GL Account
price_variance_gl_account_id.help: Standard cost variance tracking - required if using Standard Cost method

list.search_items_by_code_or_name: Search items by code or name...
list.no_inventory_items_yet_create_your_first: No inventory items yet. Create your first item to get started.
list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} item(s).

create.breadcrumbs_description: Create or edit a coding record for this inventory master list.
create.level4_preview_hint: Choose a Level 3 parent to see the next Level 4 account code.
create.level4_preview_note: Saving creates this code in Chart of Accounts under the selected Level 3 parent.
create.level4_preview_note_party_code: The Vendor / Customer / Transporter / GL code is assigned automatically from the next sequence under the selected Level 3 parent. The preview below shows what will be used when you save.

list.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

fields.coa_level3_parent_id: Accrued / Payable — Level 3 parent (from Account Configuration)

create.configure_unit_of_measure_conversions_on: Configure unit of measure conversions (one From UOM, multiple To UOM + factor)
create.msg_please_correct_the_errors_below_and_: Please correct the errors below and try again.
create.msg_at_least_one_conversion_row_is_requi: At least one conversion row is required.
create.desc_create: Select a From UOM and add one or more To UOM with conversion factor (1 From = factor × To)
create.desc_edit: Update conversions for the selected From UOM

list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} UOM conversion(s).
list.confirm_delete_conversion: Delete conversion: {from} → {to}? This cannot be undone.

create.configure_unit_of_measure_master_data: Configure unit of measure master data
create.msg_please_correct_the_errors_below_and_: Please correct the errors below and try again.
create.desc_create: Add a new unit of measure to your inventory system
create.desc_edit: Update the unit of measure details below
create.ph_uom_code: Enter UOM code (e.g., KG, M, L, PCS, HR)
create.ph_symbol: Enter symbol (e.g., kg, m, L, pcs)

list.search_uoms_by_code_name_or_symbol: Search UOMs by code, name or symbol...
list.bulk_delete_text: You are about to delete {count} unit(s) of measure.

list.title: Purchase requisitions
list.description: Draft and track internal purchase requests for your company and location.
list.subtitle: {count} requisition(s) in this view.
list.empty: No purchase requisitions yet — create one to get started.
list.swal_delete_body: PR {number} is a draft. Choose whether to keep a recoverable copy in the recycle bin or remove it permanently.
list.swal_bulk_approve_text: {count} draft requisition(s) will be marked approved.
list.no_drafts_selected: Select at least one draft requisition to approve.

create.breadcrumb_desc: Raise an internal purchase request before a purchase order. Lines can be converted to a PO later; POs may also be created without a PR.
create.title: Purchase requisition
create.subtitle: Header, line items, and whether to save as draft or approved.
create.subtitle_edit: Only drafts can be edited. Saving can keep this PR as draft or mark it approved.
create.lines_hint: Add one or more items. Use Tab to move across cells; item and UOM lists are keyboard searchable.
create.lines_empty: No lines yet — add at least one line to save.
create.msg_fix_header: Please fix the highlighted header fields.
create.msg_fix_lines: Please correct line items (item, UOM, and quantity are required; quantity must be greater than zero).

pr_number.label: PR number
pr_number.help: Configured under Inventory → Document Number Configuration. New documents show the next number that will be used when you save.

pr_date.label: Requisition date
pr_date.help: Date the request is raised (typically today).

required_by_date.label: Required by
required_by_date.help: When materials are needed at the latest.

deliver_to_location_id.label: Deliver to (branch / location)
deliver_to_location_id.help: Ship-to or receiving branch for this request.

delivery_address.label: Delivery address
delivery_address.help: Override or complete the address if different from the location master.

currency_id.label: Currency
currency_id.help: Used for estimated line values only; PO may use final commercial terms.

fx_rate.label: FX rate to base
fx_rate.help: Spot or policy rate when currency is not base currency.

requested_by.label: Requested by
requested_by.help: Defaults can be set from your user profile later.

justification.label: Justification / business case
justification.help: Supports approval and audit (SoD: requester ≠ approver).

initial_status.label: When saved
initial_status.help: Draft stays pending until approved from the list. Approved is final for this workflow.

item.label: Item
item.help: Active items for this company and location.

description.label: Description
description.help: Optional; defaults from item master when item is selected.

uom.label: UOM
uom.help: Usually purchase UOM from item master.

estimated_price.label: Est. unit price
estimated_price.help: Indicative budget; not binding until final PO.

need_by_date.label: Need by
need_by_date.help: Line-level need date overrides header when filled.

list.title: Purchase orders
list.description: Create vendor purchase orders with or without a purchase requisition. Approved PRs can load lines and ship-to defaults.
list.subtitle: {count} order(s) in this view.
list.swal_delete_body: PO {number} is a draft. Choose whether to keep a recoverable copy in the recycle bin or remove it permanently.
list.swal_bulk_approve_text: {count} draft purchase order(s) will be marked approved.
list.no_drafts_selected: Select at least one draft order to approve.
list.empty: No purchase orders yet — create one to get started.

create.breadcrumb_desc: Commercial purchase to vendor. Link an approved PR to copy lines, or leave unlinked for a direct PO.
create.title: Purchase order
create.subtitle: Vendor, commercial header, and line items (qty & unit price required).
create.subtitle_edit: Only drafts can be edited. You can save as draft or approved.
create.pr_link_hint: Choose whether this PO is based on an approved internal requisition. When linked, pick a PR and use Load from PR to copy lines and ship-to hints.
create.lines_hint: Enter ordered quantity and unit price for each line. Optional line discount adjusts the display subtotal.
create.msg_fix_lines: Each line needs item, UOM, ordered quantity, and unit price (both valid numbers greater than zero).
create.msg_pick_pr_first: Select an approved purchase requisition first.
create.msg_loaded_from_pr: Header hints and lines were loaded from the selected PR. Review prices before saving.
create.msg_pr_load_failed: Could not load the purchase requisition.
create.msg_pr_required: Choose an approved PR or switch to Without PR.

po_number.label: PO number
po_number.help: Configured under Inventory → Document Number Configuration.

vendor_id.label: Vendor
vendor_id.help: Active vendor from master (Chart of Accounts party).

po_type.label: PO type
po_type.help: Standard, blanket agreement, or import purchase.

is_blanket.label: Blanket PO
is_blanket.help: Enable when this order is a master blanket agreement.

expected_delivery_date.label: Expected delivery
expected_delivery_date.help: Header default receipt date for lines.

delivery_address.label: Delivery address
delivery_address.help: Full address if different from location master.

tax_inclusive.label: Tax-inclusive prices
tax_inclusive.help: Toggle when line prices include tax.

header_discount_percent.label: Header discount %
header_discount_percent.help: For display; line-level discount is on each row.

initial_status.label: When saved
initial_status.help: Draft stays pending until approved from the list.

notes.label: Notes / terms
notes.help: Special conditions visible on documents where configured.

item.label: Item
item.help: Active items for this company and location.

description.label: Description
description.help: Defaults from item; editable for PO print.

ordered_qty.label: Ordered qty
ordered_qty.help: Quantity to receive against this line.

unit_price.label: Unit price
unit_price.help: Price per UOM in PO currency.

create.breadcrumb_description: Set running document numbers for inventory (e.g. purchase requisitions).
create.subtitle_add: Prefix, numeric length, next running number, and reset rules for this company and location.
create.subtitle_edit: Update numbering for this document type.
create.ph_running_number: Next value to use (padded to length)
create.val_number_length_required: Number length must be at least 1
create.val_running_number_required: Starting number must be at least 1

list.empty_hint: Create a configuration so purchase requisitions use your prefix and running sequence.
list.confirm_delete_text: Remove settings for “{name}”. New documents may fall back to default numbering until you add a configuration again.
